summary: Comprehensive E2E verification of all 11 user-requested workflows for Hishab Nikash Pro. 10/10 backend E2E tests PASSED covering invoice->payment->AR drop, bill->vendor payment->AP drop, stock receipt->inventory increase, P&L and Balance Sheet reports, Receivables/Payables, AI Assistant (both overdue and inventory queries return real contextual data), and multi-company data isolation. Frontend UI verified on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x812): dashboard KPIs, sidebar with 21 nav items, company switcher, P&L report with CSV/Print/date filter, AI Assistant accessible, and mobile hamburger menu now present (previously flagged issue RESOLVED).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2406 lines — consider splitting into routers (invoices, bills, payments, reports, ai) for maintainability
receive-payment and pay-vendor endpoints modify customer/vendor balances but do NOT create corresponding journal entries (GL may drift from AR/AP sub-ledger). Consider posting JEs on payment.
AI chat endpoint has no rate limiting — vulnerable to cost abuse with Emergent LLM key

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows verified: dashboard, company switch, reports, AI assistant, mobile)

test_credentials: session_token=test_session_ukrrqssgkvg (bearer), user=test.owner@hishabnikash.dev, companies: ckfrozen, haor, deshi, ckcanada
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed invoices, bills, payments and stock receipts on ckfrozen company. Not deleted (tracked by TEST_ prefix in notes/reference).
context_for_next_testing_agent: E2E test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_e2e_workflows.py covers all 11 user-requested flows. All passing. Mobile hamburger (data-testid='mobile-menu-btn') now present. Company switcher has data-testid='company-switcher'. Safe to proceed with new features (Email/Password auth, backend refactor) — core platform is STABLE.
rca of the issue: None — stability check passed cleanly. No regressions detected.
